## Summary

Describe what changed, why it changed, and the scope of the pull request.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor or maintenance
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Build or tooling

## Testing Performed

List the commands and manual checks used to validate the change.

```text
# Add commands and results here
```

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and does not include unrelated modifications.
- [ ] Relevant tests and checks pass.
- [ ] New or changed behavior is covered by tests where appropriate.
- [ ] Documentation is updated where required.
- [ ] No credentials, tokens, personal data, generated files, or debugging artifacts are included.
- [ ] Sensitive or destructive operations preserve explicit confirmation requirements.
- [ ] The local-first and privacy model is preserved or any exception is clearly documented.
- [ ] User-interface changes include sanitized screenshots when useful.
